message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 30
  BoxPadding 10
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ActorBackgroundColor #00B7EB
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  DatabaseBorderColor #000000
  DatabaseBackgroundColor #00B7EB
}

actor "sdx_downstream" as sdx
actor "downstream_quarantine" as dq

participant "Downstream" as Downstream
participant "Store" as Store
participant "TransformCS" as TransformCS
participant "Sequence" as Sequence
database "Postgres" as Postgres
rectangle "FTP" as FTP #99FF00

sdx -[#000000,dashed]> Downstream : Consume tx_id

Downstream -> Store : GET /responses/{tx_id}
activate Store
Store -[#000000,dashed]> Postgres
Store --> Downstream : return response json
deactivate Store

break [error]
  Downstream -[#000000,dashed]> dq
end

Downstream -> Sequence : GET /sequence
activate Sequence
Sequence -[#000000,dashed]> Postgres
Sequence --> Downstream : return number
deactivate Sequence

break [error]
  Downstream -[#000000,dashed]> dq
end

alt [common-software]
  Downstream -[#000000,dashed]> TransformCS : POST /common-software/{sequence_no}
  activate TransformCS
else [cora]
  Downstream -[#000000,dashed]> TransformCS : POST /cora/{sequence_no}
  activate TransformCS
else [cord]
  Downstream -> TransformCS : POST /cord/{sequence_no}
  activate TransformCS
end

TransformCS -> Sequence : GET /image-sequence?n
activate Sequence
Sequence -[#000000,dashed]> Postgres
Sequence --> TransformCS : return list
deactivate Sequence

TransformCS --> Downstream : Return Zip
deactivate TransformCS

break [error]
  Downstream -[#000000,dashed]> dq
end

Downstream -> Downstream : Unzip
Downstream -> Downstream : Send files
Downstream -[#000000,dashed]> FTP

@enduml
```
